approval_statements.broader_top20: BROADER TOP-20 HYPERLIQUID-SUPPORTED PAPER/SANDBOX TRADING IS APPROVED.
approval_statements.scope: Hyperliquid testnet/sandbox only; internal 10,000 USDC paper-equity ledger; top-20 Hyperliquid-supported paper/sandbox scanning and approval/risk-gated sandbox routing foundation.

charting.attribution: Charts use TradingView Lightweight Charts v5.2.0 under Apache-2.0.

paper_equity.confirmation_source: Hyperliquid sandbox/testnet balance polled every 60 seconds

routed_orders_paper_trades.source: paper scanner and UAT3.4 routed sandbox ledger summaries

sizing_policy.policy: PT0 sizing uses current realized internal paper equity, not the static initial 10,000 USDC. Realized plus unrealized PnL is displayed for risk.
